problem id: bd53ea3a
category: bit_manipulation

rule: (SHL(7) XOR SHR(7)) AND ROT(6)

examples:
  00100101 -> 00000000
  11101110 -> 00000001
  10000111 -> 10000001
  00010010 -> 00000000
  10010111 -> 10000001
  10110110 -> 00000001
  01101111 -> 10000000
  10010011 -> 10000000
  00011100 -> 00000000

query: 00100000
predicted answer: 00000000
